summary: Audience‑sourced recording of a fun show with a memorable Bill Kreutzmann moment and generally good performance.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as enjoyable, highlighting a playful interaction where drummer Bill pointed his stick at the standing fans. Aside from that anecdote, the show is portrayed as solid throughout, with no major complaints about the music or sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review emphasizes a good performance and pleasant audience experience; no concrete audio comments, so rating leans on show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not comment on clarity or mix, indicating no noticeable problems but also providing no details about sound fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as generally good; the Hell>Bertha transition prompted a shift in audience seating and led to a memorable moment, but no specific song critiques are offered.

band_member_comments.Drums: Bill smiled and pointed his drum stick at the standing fans, creating a memorable interaction.
